desired_runtime_modes.label: CPU-only
desired_runtime_modes.notes: Reference implementation target for offline deterministic generation before optimized runtime paths.

desired_runtime_modes.label: CPU + GPU
desired_runtime_modes.notes: Future optional runtime mode for compact on-device reduction using a backend abstraction, not a direct copy of CUDA/MPS assumptions.

desired_runtime_modes.label: CPU + TPU
desired_runtime_modes.notes: Future runtime mode requiring a non-CUDA-shaped abstraction; no TPU implementation exists in RADJAX-Tome.

historical_components.notes: Historical CLI shape only; RADJAX-Tome public CLI should remain backend-neutral.
historical_components.summary: Command-line driver for real-teacher fingerprint/TOME generation.

historical_components.notes: Useful staged CPU pipeline reference: source corpus to prompt batches to prefetch/tokenization to inference/reduction to ordered artifact commit.
historical_components.summary: Coordinated staged CPU pipeline for prompt preparation, teacher execution, compact reduction, and writer commits.

historical_components.notes: Should be redesigned around RADJAX-Tome artifact contracts and runtime metadata.
historical_components.recommended_destination: future radjax_tome backend runtime topology module
historical_components.summary: Resolved runtime topology and capture settings for optimized generation.

historical_components.notes: RADJAX-Tome has HF metadata/specimen boundaries, but not the optimized runtime backend from the historical stack.
historical_components.summary: Historical Hugging Face teacher execution boundary for real model inference.

historical_components.notes: Reference for reducing full-vocabulary logits into compact statistics on device before host transfer.
historical_components.summary: CUDA/MPS-style compact reduction path for real-teacher logits.

historical_components.notes: memory-scalability fix over the vocabulary axis; not an automatic throughput guarantee.
historical_components.recommended_destination: future CPU + GPU chunked reduction-policy implementation
historical_components.summary: Chunked GPU vocabulary reduction that avoids full-vocab temporary workspaces.

historical_components.notes: RADJAX-Tome has active fingerprint artifact writers; optimized capture writer behavior should target future cover-page and bundle contracts.
historical_components.recommended_destination: radjax_tome.fingerprint plus future Tome writer integration
historical_components.summary: Artifact writing boundary for fingerprint capture outputs.

historical_components.notes: RADJAX-Tome already has cascaded target support; dynamic top-k and runtime reduction policy should be added later.
historical_components.recommended_destination: radjax_tome.targets and future dynamic top-k policy
historical_components.summary: Compression settings and soft-label policy reference for compact target artifacts.

migration_recommendations: Implement cover page v1 before optimized generator machinery targets Tome artifacts.
Implement bundle container after the unpacked artifact contract is stable.
Define backend runtime modes before porting CUDA-specific optimizations.
Rebuild CPU-only generation as the reference runtime before optional acceleration paths.
Port GPU compact and chunked vocabulary reduction only behind an explicit CPU + GPU runtime mode.
Design CPU + TPU as a separate runtime mode with non-CUDA-shaped execution and reduction boundaries.
Wait on dynamic top-k until metadata and reduction policy surfaces exist.
non_goals: Do not implement cover_page.json in Spec 3.0.
Do not implement the Tome bundle container in Spec 3.0.
Do not implement CPU/GPU/TPU runtime modes in Spec 3.0.
Do not implement dynamic top-k in Spec 3.0.
Do not copy historical QRWKV-XLA optimization code wholesale.
Do not add torch, transformers, jax, CUDA, MPS, or TPU requirements.
Do not claim TPU implementation already exists.

roadmap_arcs.label: Optimization Handoff Inventory and Roadmap Lock
roadmap_arcs.notes: Bookmark historical optimization context and lock implementation ordering.

roadmap_arcs.label: Cover Page v1 for unpacked Tome directory
roadmap_arcs.notes: Define the unpacked artifact contract before optimized writers target it.

roadmap_arcs.label: Tome Bundle Container v1
roadmap_arcs.notes: Package the artifact after the unpacked contract is stable.

roadmap_arcs.label: Teacher Backend Runtime Modes: CPU, CPU+GPU, CPU+TPU
roadmap_arcs.notes: Define runtime abstraction before porting CUDA-specific optimizations.

roadmap_arcs.label: Dynamic Top-K Compression Policy
roadmap_arcs.notes: Wait for artifact metadata and backend reduction policy surfaces.
